subject: Reverting javax.servler-api to verison 3.0.1
commit_message:
Reverting javax.servler-api to verison 3.0.1

Issue-ID: SDNC-1581
Signed-off-by: Singal, Kapil (ks220y) <ks220y@att.com>
Change-Id: Ife5e37489bf3a6571435d68730a21e4c9d5d85c0

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/ccsdk-parent-maven-verify-master-mvn36-openjdk11/90/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/ccsdk-parent-maven-verify-master-mvn36-openjdk11/90

Patch Set 1: -Code-Review

javax.servlet-api is two times available in the bom's. Is this by accident or intentional?
Isn't it better to have it at one place?

[ccsdk/parent.git] / dependencies-bom /
 137                 <groupId>javax.servlet</groupId>
 138                 <artifactId>javax.servlet-api</artifactId>
 139                 <version>3.1.0</version>
[ccsdk/parent.git] / installed-odl-bom /
           <dependency>
 374                 <groupId>javax.servlet</groupId>
 375                 <artifactId>javax.servlet-api</artifactId>
 376                 <version>4.0.1</version>

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1: -Code-Review
> 
> javax.servlet-api is two times available in the bom's. Is this by accident or intentional?
> Isn't it better to have it at one place?
> 
> [ccsdk/parent.git] / dependencies-bom /
>  137                 <groupId>javax.servlet</groupId>
>  138                 <artifactId>javax.servlet-api</artifactId>
>  139                 <version>3.1.0</version>
> [ccsdk/parent.git] / installed-odl-bom /
>            <dependency>
>  374                 <groupId>javax.servlet</groupId>
>  375                 <artifactId>javax.servlet-api</artifactId>
>  376                 <version>4.0.1</version>

Those are two dfferent pom files.

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> > Patch Set 1: -Code-Review
> > 
> > javax.servlet-api is two times available in the bom's. Is this by accident or intentional?
> > Isn't it better to have it at one place?
> > 
> > [ccsdk/parent.git] / dependencies-bom /
> >  137                 <groupId>javax.servlet</groupId>
> >  138                 <artifactId>javax.servlet-api</artifactId>
> >  139                 <version>3.1.0</version>
> > [ccsdk/parent.git] / installed-odl-bom /
> >            <dependency>
> >  374                 <groupId>javax.servlet</groupId>
> >  375                 <artifactId>javax.servlet-api</artifactId>
> >  376                 <version>4.0.1</version>
> 
> Those are two dfferent pom files. and installed-odl-bom is reflaction of what Opendaylight distributed and should be used by bundles being deployed over ODL whereas dependencies-bom is for non-odl bundles/packages.

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> > Patch Set 1: -Code-Review
> > 
> > javax.servlet-api is two times available in the bom's. Is this by accident or intentional?
> > Isn't it better to have it at one place?
> > 
> > [ccsdk/parent.git] / dependencies-bom /
> >  137                 <groupId>javax.servlet</groupId>
> >  138                 <artifactId>javax.servlet-api</artifactId>
> >  139                 <version>3.1.0</version>
> > [ccsdk/parent.git] / installed-odl-bom /
> >            <dependency>
> >  374                 <groupId>javax.servlet</groupId>
> >  375                 <artifactId>javax.servlet-api</artifactId>
> >  376                 <version>4.0.1</version>
> 
> Those are two dfferent pom files.

Yes .. both are imported by CCSDK parents for ODL apps and used by (e.g.) binding-parent, that it used by sdnr artifacts. Doesn't make sense to me. It is not clear who makes the race?

> Yes .. both are imported by CCSDK parents for ODL apps and used by (e.g.) binding-parent, that it used by sdnr artifacts. Doesn't make sense to me. It is not clear who makes the race?

Agree.. and same I reported to Dan long back, and forgot to follow up or cleanup .
Change has been successfully merged by Dan Timoney
